response.original_title: One Foot In Front Of The Other
response.overview: Two days, almost 40 miles. After cancer cut her last attempt short Melissa Barnett once more takes on the Sheltowee Hikers Challenge, encouraged by her good friend and veteran hiker Nichole Nimmo.
response.tagline: You have to live life like it's finite
response.title: One Foot In Front Of The Other
